requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency — SREDA Star-Rating Label for Refrigerators (Bangladesh)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效——SREDA电冰箱星级能效标识（孟加拉国）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效——SREDA電冰箱星級能效標識（孟加拉）

summary.en: Bangladesh operates an energy-efficiency labelling programme administered by the Sustainable and Renewable Energy Development Authority (SREDA) under the Sustainable and Renewable Energy Development Authority Act, 2012, working with BSTI on the underlying test standards. Refrigerators are among the appliances covered by the national Star Labelling Programme, which assigns a star rating (typically a 1-to-5 star scale) based on measured energy performance. The energy-performance test methodology is based on the Bangladesh Standard adopting the IEC 62552 series (household refrigerating appliances — characteristics and test methods). Suppliers/importers must have the model tested, obtain the applicable star rating, and display the SREDA star label on the product before market placement where the programme makes labelling mandatory for the category. The rating thresholds, scope, and mandatory-vs-voluntary status by appliance type are set out in SREDA's labelling rules and schedules, which should be confirmed for the current period.
summary.zh: 孟加拉国由可持续与可再生能源发展局（SREDA）依据《2012年可持续与可再生能源发展局法》运营能效标识计划，并与BSTI在底层检测标准上协作。电冰箱属于国家星级标识计划覆盖的器具之一，该计划依据实测能效性能赋予星级评定（通常为1至5星）。能效性能检测方法基于采用IEC 62552系列（家用制冷器具——特性与试验方法）的孟加拉国标准。在该计划对此类别强制要求标识的情况下，供应商/进口商须在投放市场前对型号进行检测、取得相应星级评定，并在产品上展示SREDA星级标识。各器具类型的评级门槛、范围及强制/自愿状态载于SREDA的标识规则与附表，应针对当前期间予以确认。
summary.zht: 孟加拉由可持續與可再生能源發展局（SREDA）依據《2012年可持續與可再生能源發展局法》運營能效標識計畫，並與BSTI在底層檢測標準上協作。電冰箱屬於國家星級標識計畫覆蓋的器具之一，該計畫依據實測能效性能賦予星級評定（通常為1至5星）。能效性能檢測方法基於採用IEC 62552系列（家用製冷器具——特性與試驗方法）的孟加拉標準。在該計畫對此類別強制要求標識的情況下，供應商/進口商須在投放市場前對型號進行檢測、取得相應星級評定，並在產品上展示SREDA星級標識。各器具類型的評級門檻、範圍及強制/自願狀態載於SREDA的標識規則與附表，應針對當前期間予以確認。

standards_or_laws: Sustainable and Renewable Energy Development Authority Act, 2012 — legal basis for SREDA and the national energy-efficiency labelling/Star Labelling Programme
SREDA Star Labelling Programme — star-rating energy label for refrigerators (rating scale, thresholds and mandatory scope per SREDA schedules)
BDS adoption of IEC 62552 series — Household refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods (energy-performance measurement basis)

summary.en: China's mandatory energy-efficiency standard for household refrigerators is GB 12021.2-2015 (Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators), which assigns a 1-to-5 grade scale (Grade 1 most efficient, Grade 5 minimum threshold) and minimum annual energy-consumption limits. It is mandatory (GB), enforced by SAMR, with the China Energy Label (CEL) administered by NDRC/SAMR and the China National Institute of Standardization (CNIS). The CEL must be displayed before sale in China. China's GB 12021.2 grades use a different test methodology and threshold basis than Bangladesh's SREDA star programme; a Chinese energy grade does not map directly to a SREDA star rating and is not accepted by SREDA without testing to the Bangladesh (IEC 62552-based) methodology.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的强制性能效标准为GB 12021.2-2015（家用电冰箱耗电量限定值及能效等级），采用1至5级评级（1级最高效，5级为最低门槛）及年耗电量最低限值。该标准为强制性国家标准（GB），由市场监管总局（SAMR）执行，中国能效标识（CEL）由NDRC/SAMR及中国标准化研究院（CNIS）管理。CEL须在中国销售前展示。中国GB 12021.2等级使用的试验方法及门槛基准与孟加拉国SREDA星级计划不同；中国能效等级不能直接对应SREDA星级评定，未经按孟加拉国（基于IEC 62552）方法检测亦不被SREDA接受。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的強制性能效標準為GB 12021.2-2015（家用電冰箱耗電量限定值及能效等級），採用1至5級評級（1級最高效，5級為最低門檻）及年耗電量最低限值。該標準為強制性國家標準（GB），由市場監管總局（SAMR）執行，中國能效標識（CEL）由NDRC/SAMR及中國標準化研究院（CNIS）管理。CEL須在中國銷售前展示。中國GB 12021.2等級使用的試驗方法及門檻基準與孟加拉SREDA星級計畫不同；中國能效等級不能直接對應SREDA星級評定，未經按孟加拉（基於IEC 62552）方法檢測亦不被SREDA接受。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (mandatory; enforced by SAMR/NDRC under the China Energy Label system)
GB/T 8059-2016 — Household and similar refrigerating appliances (test method standard, aligned with IEC 62552 series)

gap.en: Although both China (GB 12021.2) and Bangladesh (SREDA) ultimately reference IEC 62552-based test methods, the rating systems and thresholds differ: (1) Re-rating to SREDA — a Chinese Grade 1 or Grade 2 rating does not convert to a SREDA star rating; the model must be tested to the Bangladesh (IEC 62552) methodology and assigned a star value under SREDA's scale. (2) SREDA star label — where labelling is mandatory for refrigerators, the SREDA star label must be displayed; the Chinese CEL cannot serve as the Bangladesh label. (3) Scope/period confirmation — exporters must confirm whether the SREDA Star Labelling Programme currently makes labelling mandatory for the specific refrigerator category and what minimum star/MEPS threshold applies, since the schedules evolve. Unlike the EU, Bangladesh has no EPREL-style centralized pre-registration database obligation, but model registration with SREDA/BSTI for the star label is required where the programme applies.
gap.zh: 尽管中国（GB 12021.2）与孟加拉国（SREDA）最终均参考基于IEC 62552的检测方法，但评级体系与门槛不同：（1）重新评定为SREDA星级——中国1级或2级评定不能转换为SREDA星级；型号须按孟加拉国（IEC 62552）方法检测并按SREDA标度赋予星值。（2）SREDA星级标识——在对电冰箱强制要求标识的情况下，须展示SREDA星级标识；中国CEL不能充当孟加拉国标识。（3）范围/期间确认——出口商须确认SREDA星级标识计划当前是否对该具体电冰箱类别强制要求标识，以及适用的最低星级/能效限定值（MEPS），因附表会演变。与欧盟不同，孟加拉国没有类似EPREL的集中式预注册数据库义务，但在计划适用时须就星级标识向SREDA/BSTI进行型号登记。
gap.zht: 儘管中國（GB 12021.2）與孟加拉（SREDA）最終均參考基於IEC 62552的檢測方法，但評級體系與門檻不同：（1）重新評定為SREDA星級——中國1級或2級評定不能轉換為SREDA星級；型號須按孟加拉（IEC 62552）方法檢測並按SREDA標度賦予星值。（2）SREDA星級標識——在對電冰箱強制要求標識的情況下，須展示SREDA星級標識；中國CEL不能充當孟加拉標識。（3）範圍/期間確認——出口商須確認SREDA星級標識計畫當前是否對該具體電冰箱類別強制要求標識，以及適用的最低星級/能效限定值（MEPS），因附表會演變。與歐盟不同，孟加拉沒有類似EPREL的集中式預登記數據庫義務，但在計畫適用時須就星級標識向SREDA/BSTI進行型號登記。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional/Mandatory — SREDA star-rating label is required for refrigerators where the Star Labelling Programme makes the category mandatory; star scale and MEPS thresholds per current SREDA schedules (confirm scope and period)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 12021.2-2015 energy-efficiency grade compliance and China Energy Label display required before sale in China; administered by SAMR/NDRC

source.publisher: Sustainable and Renewable Energy Development Authority (SREDA), Bangladesh

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Bangladesh runs a SREDA star-rating energy label for refrigerators on an IEC 62552 test basis, distinct from China's GB 12021.2 grades. A Chinese energy grade does not convert to a SREDA star rating; the model must be tested to the Bangladesh methodology and labelled under SREDA where mandatory. Confirm the current SREDA schedule scope and minimum star/MEPS threshold for refrigerators before market placement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 孟加拉国基于IEC 62552检测运营SREDA电冰箱星级能效标识，区别于中国GB 12021.2等级。中国能效等级不能转换为SREDA星级；型号须按孟加拉国方法检测，并在强制时按SREDA标识。投放市场前请确认SREDA当前附表对电冰箱的覆盖范围及最低星级/MEPS门槛。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 孟加拉基於IEC 62552檢測運營SREDA電冰箱星級能效標識，區別於中國GB 12021.2等級。中國能效等級不能轉換為SREDA星級；型號須按孟加拉方法檢測，並在強制時按SREDA標識。投放市場前請確認SREDA當前附表對電冰箱的覆蓋範圍及最低星級/MEPS門檻。

requirement_topic.en: Electrical Interface & Markings — 220 V / 50 Hz Supply, Plug Type and Labelling (Bangladesh)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气接口与标识——220 V/50 Hz供电、插头类型及标识（孟加拉国）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣介面與標識——220 V/50 Hz供電、插頭類型及標識（孟加拉）

summary.en: Bangladesh's domestic electricity supply is 220 V, 50 Hz, single-phase for household use. This is the same mains frequency as China (50 Hz) and a similar single-phase nominal voltage (China is 220 V single-phase; China's three-phase is 380 V). Refrigerators sold in Bangladesh must be rated for and safely operate on the 220 V / 50 Hz supply, with appliance ratings, markings, and protective measures suited to local conditions (including tolerance to voltage fluctuation common on the grid). Plugs and socket-outlets in Bangladesh commonly follow British-derived and round-pin patterns (type D, G and K-style), so the supplied cord/plug must match local outlets or the importer must fit a compliant plug. Product markings, the rating plate, safety instructions and the user manual must be acceptable to BSTI under the Certification Mark scheme and intelligible to the local market. This row captures the practical electrical-interface and marking adaptation rather than a separate certification regime.
summary.zh: 孟加拉国家用电力供应为220 V、50 Hz、单相。其电网频率与中国相同（50 Hz），单相标称电压相近（中国单相为220 V；中国三相为380 V）。在孟加拉国销售的电冰箱须按220 V/50 Hz供电额定并安全运行，其器具额定值、标识及保护措施须适配当地条件（包括对电网常见电压波动的耐受）。孟加拉国的插头与插座普遍沿用英式及圆脚式样（D、G和K型），故配套电源线/插头须匹配当地插座，或由进口商配装合规插头。产品标识、铭牌、安全说明及用户手册须在认证标志制度下被BSTI接受，并为当地市场所理解。本行捕捉的是实际电气接口与标识适配，而非独立的认证制度。
summary.zht: 孟加拉家用電力供應為220 V、50 Hz、單相。其電網頻率與中國相同（50 Hz），單相標稱電壓相近（中國單相為220 V；中國三相為380 V）。在孟加拉銷售的電冰箱須按220 V/50 Hz供電額定並安全運行，其器具額定值、標識及保護措施須適配當地條件（包括對電網常見電壓波動的耐受）。孟加拉的插頭與插座普遍沿用英式及圓腳式樣（D、G和K型），故配套電源線/插頭須匹配當地插座，或由進口商配裝合規插頭。產品標識、銘牌、安全說明及用戶手冊須在認證標誌制度下被BSTI接受，並為當地市場所理解。本行捕捉的是實際電氣介面與標識適配，而非獨立的認證制度。

standards_or_laws: Bangladesh domestic supply — 220 V, 50 Hz single-phase (national grid nominal for household use)
BSTI Act, 2018 — rating-plate, marking and labelling acceptability under the Certification Mark scheme
Plug/socket types D, G and K-style commonly used in Bangladesh — cord/plug compatibility for the supplied appliance

summary.en: China's domestic supply is 220 V, 50 Hz single-phase for household appliances (three-phase distribution is 380 V), so the mains frequency (50 Hz) and single-phase nominal voltage match Bangladesh closely — a Chinese refrigerator's motor/compressor and electrical design are generally directly compatible with the Bangladesh supply without frequency conversion. The principal differences are at the plug/socket and marking level: China uses GB 2099/GB 1002 plug types (type A/I-style flat and angled pins), whereas Bangladesh uses British-derived/round-pin outlets (type D/G/K-style). Chinese rating plates and manuals are prepared for the domestic market and must be adapted for BSTI acceptance and the local market. The electrical compatibility is favourable; the adaptation is mainly the plug/cord and markings.
summary.zh: 中国家用器具的供电为220 V、50 Hz单相（三相配电为380 V），故电网频率（50 Hz）与单相标称电压与孟加拉国高度匹配——中国电冰箱的电机/压缩机及电气设计一般可直接兼容孟加拉国供电，无需频率转换。主要差异在插头/插座及标识层面：中国采用GB 2099/GB 1002插头类型（A/I型扁脚及斜脚），而孟加拉国采用英式/圆脚插座（D/G/K型）。中国铭牌与手册为国内市场准备，须适配以获BSTI接受并适应当地市场。电气兼容性良好；适配主要在插头/电源线及标识。
summary.zht: 中國家用器具的供電為220 V、50 Hz單相（三相配電為380 V），故電網頻率（50 Hz）與單相標稱電壓與孟加拉高度匹配——中國電冰箱的電機/壓縮機及電氣設計一般可直接相容孟加拉供電，無需頻率轉換。主要差異在插頭/插座及標識層面：中國採用GB 2099/GB 1002插頭類型（A/I型扁腳及斜腳），而孟加拉採用英式/圓腳插座（D/G/K型）。中國銘牌與手冊為國內市場準備，須適配以獲BSTI接受並適應當地市場。電氣相容性良好；適配主要在插頭/電源線及標識。

standards_or_laws: China domestic supply — 220 V, 50 Hz single-phase for household appliances; 380 V three-phase distribution
GB 2099 / GB 1002 — Chinese plug and socket-outlet standards (type A/I-style)

gap.en: The electrical-interface gap is small and favourable because the 50 Hz frequency and single-phase 220 V nominal are effectively the same as China — no frequency conversion or major redesign of the compressor is needed. The remaining adaptations are practical: (1) Plug/cord — the supplied plug must match Bangladesh outlets (type D/G/K-style) or the importer must fit a compliant plug; a Chinese type A/I plug is not directly usable. (2) Rating plate and markings — the appliance rating plate, model markings, and warnings must be acceptable under the BSTI Certification Mark scheme and reference the 220 V / 50 Hz rating. (3) User documentation — operating and safety instructions must be intelligible to the local market. (4) Voltage robustness — appliances should tolerate local grid voltage fluctuation. There is no separate Bangladesh certification distinct from the BSTI safety/CM route for these interface items; they are handled within the BSTI assessment and importer preparation.
gap.zh: 电气接口差距较小且有利，因为50 Hz频率与单相220 V标称实质上与中国相同——无需频率转换或对压缩机进行重大重新设计。其余为实际适配：（1）插头/电源线——配套插头须匹配孟加拉国插座（D/G/K型），或由进口商配装合规插头；中国A/I型插头不可直接使用。（2）铭牌与标识——器具铭牌、型号标识及警示须在BSTI认证标志制度下被接受，并标注220 V/50 Hz额定。（3）用户文件——操作与安全说明须为当地市场所理解。（4）电压耐受性——器具应耐受当地电网电压波动。这些接口事项不存在区别于BSTI安全/CM路径的独立孟加拉国认证；均在BSTI评定及进口商准备中处理。
gap.zht: 電氣介面差距較小且有利，因為50 Hz頻率與單相220 V標稱實質上與中國相同——無需頻率轉換或對壓縮機進行重大重新設計。其餘為實際適配：（1）插頭/電源線——配套插頭須匹配孟加拉插座（D/G/K型），或由進口商配裝合規插頭；中國A/I型插頭不可直接使用。（2）銘牌與標識——器具銘牌、型號標識及警示須在BSTI認證標誌制度下被接受，並標注220 V/50 Hz額定。（3）用戶文件——操作與安全說明須為當地市場所理解。（4）電壓耐受性——器具應耐受當地電網電壓波動。這些介面事項不存在區別於BSTI安全/CM路徑的獨立孟加拉認證；均在BSTI評定及進口商準備中處理。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (within BSTI) — appliance must be rated and marked for 220 V / 50 Hz single-phase supply with a Bangladesh-compatible plug/cord; rating plate and markings acceptable under the BSTI Certification Mark scheme
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (within CCC) — appliance rated and marked for 220 V / 50 Hz single-phase domestic supply; Chinese plug type A/I per GB 2099/GB 1002

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Bangladesh's 220 V / 50 Hz single-phase supply matches China's household supply closely (same 50 Hz; China three-phase is 380 V), so no frequency conversion is needed. Adaptation is mainly the plug/cord (type D/G/K-style outlets) and rating-plate/markings acceptable to BSTI. These interface items are handled within the BSTI Certification Mark assessment and importer preparation, not a separate certification.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 孟加拉国220 V/50 Hz单相供电与中国家用供电高度匹配（同为50 Hz；中国三相为380 V），故无需频率转换。适配主要为插头/电源线（D/G/K型插座）及BSTI可接受的铭牌/标识。这些接口事项在BSTI认证标志评定及进口商准备中处理，而非独立认证。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 孟加拉220 V/50 Hz單相供電與中國家用供電高度匹配（同為50 Hz；中國三相為380 V），故無需頻率轉換。適配主要為插頭/電源線（D/G/K型插座）及BSTI可接受的銘牌/標識。這些介面事項在BSTI認證標誌評定及進口商準備中處理，而非獨立認證。
